title: gratiola rugosa
intro: Gratiola rugosa, also known as American balm or rough balm, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Gratiola rugosa include relief from muscle spasms, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
